$comment: Curated static selection for member-gate-01. Scores record fit against the current inventory, not a runtime selection result.

assumptions: login-03 is the stocked auth screen pattern and its form-section covers email, password, and external-account entry.
Validation, the lockout countdown, and the signed-in session are local UI state persisted to localStorage, not a backend.
risks: No real authentication provider or backend session is connected, so the success path only confirms local validation and a localStorage session.
The external-account buttons report their boundary instead of completing a sign-in.
The lockout is a client-side timer only and offers no protection against a scripted or multi-tab attacker.
